subject: Gundren
fact: Gundren is currently a captive whose captors are extracting information from him.
source_quote: Gundren's captors will eventually stop trying to extract information from him

subject: Gundren's potential death
fact: Multiple NPCs warned that Gundren's captors may kill him if they stop extracting information.
source_quote: may kill him, making the rescue time-sensitive

subject: Zenvon
fact: Zenvon is a halfling who lacks darkvision.
source_quote: Zenvon (halfling) lacks darkvision

subject: Sister Maela
fact: The party must coordinate with Sister Maela to navigate dark areas of the cave.
source_quote: The party must coordinate around Sister Maela and Veyra for navigation in dark areas

subject: Veyra
fact: The party must coordinate with Veyra to navigate dark areas of the cave.
source_quote: The party must coordinate around Sister Maela and Veyra for navigation in dark areas

subject: giant poisonous snake
fact: A giant poisonous snake was discovered blocking a passage inside the cave.
source_quote: A giant snake was discovered blocking a passage inside the cave

subject: retreat from snake
fact: The party retreated from the giant snake.
source_quote: retreating from the giant snake

subject: wolves
fact: Three wolves were spotted chained inside the cave.
source_quote: Three wolves were spotted chained inside the cave

subject: Red Brands
fact: The Red Brands gang continues to operate freely in Phandalin.
source_quote: The Red Brands gang continues to operate freely in Phandalin

subject: Tresendar Manor
fact: The Red Brands maintain a safehouse at Tresendar Manor.
source_quote: with their safehouse at Tresendar Manor

subject: Glasstaff
fact: Glasstaff is the leader of the Red Brands and has not yet been confronted.
source_quote: their leader Glasstaff not yet confronted

subject: Sister Garaele
fact: Sister Garaele returned to town wounded.
source_quote: Sister Garaele returned to town wounded

subject: Sister Garaele's silence
fact: Sister Garaele is not speaking about what happened to her.
source_quote: is not speaking about what happened

subject: Halia
fact: Halia works at the Phandalin Miners Exchange.
source_quote: Halia at the Phandalin Miners Exchange

subject: Halia's connection
fact: Halia's relationship with the Red Brands is unclear and she has not been visited.
source_quote: has not been visited, and her relationship with the Red Brands is unclear

subject: black stone obelisk fragments
fact: Fragments of a black stone obelisk exist and pose a threat if assembled.
source_quote: The threat of someone assembling the black stone obelisk fragments remains an unresolved background danger

subject: Nikhil Reddy
fact: Nikhil Reddy is playing the character Zenvon.
source_quote: Nikhil Reddy (as Zenvon)

subject: Regrouping
fact: The party plans to regroup after retreating from the giant snake.
source_quote: Regroup with the party after retreating from the giant snake

subject: Gundren's rescue plan
fact: Rescuing Gundren from the goblin cave is the primary objective.
source_quote: Rescue Gundren from the goblin cave as the primary objective

subject: Visiting Halia
fact: Visiting Halia to investigate her connection to the Red Brands is deferred until after the rescue.
source_quote: Visit Halia at the Phandalin Miners Exchange to investigate her connection to the Red Brands (deferred until after the rescue)

subject: Speaking with Sister Garaele
fact: Speaking with Sister Garaele through Sister Maela is deferred until after the rescue.
source_quote: Speak with Sister Garaele through Sister Maela to learn what happened to her (deferred until after the rescue)

subject: hidden tunnel
fact: Carp Alderleaf discovered a hidden tunnel.
source_quote: hidden tunnel discovered by Carp Alderleaf

subject: Carp Alderleaf
fact: Carp Alderleaf discovered a hidden tunnel.
source_quote: hidden tunnel discovered by Carp Alderleaf

subject: Shrine of Luck
fact: The party plans to return to the Shrine of Luck acolyte after rescuing Gundren.
source_quote: Return to the Shrine of Luck acolyte after rescuing Gundren

subject: receiving next quest
fact: The party expects to receive the next quest from the Shrine of Luck acolyte.
source_quote: to receive the next quest

subject: Old Owl Well
fact: Old Owl Well is a location associated with an undead threat.
source_quote: Investigate Old Owl Well and the undead threat

subject: Daran Edermath
fact: Daran Edermath is the source of the boots of striding and springing.
source_quote: earn the boots of striding and springing from Daran Edermath

subject: boots of striding and springing
fact: The boots of striding and springing are a reward for investigating Old Owl Well.
source_quote: earn the boots of striding and springing from Daran Edermath

subject: Confronting the Red Brands
fact: Confronting the Red Brands at Tresendar Manor is a future task.
source_quote: Confront the Red Brands at Tresendar Manor

subject: dealing with Glasstaff
fact: Dealing with the leader Glasstaff is a future task.
source_quote: deal with their leader Glasstaff (future task)
